title: SB ENERGY WELCOMES GAETAN FROTTE AS CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
text: Former NRG Energy executive enters SB Energy at stage of hypergrowth REDWOOD CITY, Calif. , Feb. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- SB Energy Global, LLC ("SB Energy") announced today that Gaetan Frotte has joined the company as Chief Financial Officer to lead SB Energy's corporate finance functions.

title: NRG Energy, Inc. (NRG) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 16, 2023 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Kevin Cole - SVP, IR Mauricio Gutierrez - President, CEO & Director Alberto Fornaro - EVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Angie Storozynski - Seaport David Arcaro - Morgan Stanley Steve Fleishman - Wolfe Research Operator Good day, and thank you for standing by. title: NRG Energy, Inc. Reports Full Year Results and Reaffirms 2023 Guidance
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NRG) today reported full year 2022 Net Income of $1.2 billion, or $5.17 per diluted common share. Adjusted EBITDA for the full year 2022 was $1.8 billion, Net Cash Provided by Operating Activities was $0.4 billion, and Free Cash Flow Before Growth (FCFbG) was $0.6 billion.

title: Hotter-Than-Expected Inflation Rattles Wall Street: 5 Safe Picks
text: January's slightly hot inflation led to volatility in the stock market. Thus, it's prudent to invest in risk-adjusted stocks like Campbell Soup (CPB), NRG Energy (NRG) and MGE Energy (MGEE) to name a few.

title: NRG Energy (NRG) to Post Q4 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: NRG Energy's (NRG) fourth-quarter earnings are likely to have gained from recurring synergies from Direct Energy integration and lower shares outstanding.

title: NRG Energy, Inc. to Report Full Year and Fourth Quarter 2022 Financial Results on February 16, 2023
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NRG) plans to report its Full Year and Fourth Quarter 2022 financial results on Thursday, February 16, 2023. Management will present the results during a conference call and webcast at 9:00 a.m. EST (8:00 a.m. CST). A live webcast of the conference call, including presentation materials, can be accessed through NRG's website at http://www.nrg.
